info.title: Fix biapi compilation errors with JavaParser

parts.text: "Project @biapi/ does not compile. Plan: 1) Run mvn compile in the project @biapi/ to get the compilation errors only. 2) Generate a JavaParser source code transformation to fix the errors.    - Use the project in folder @/workspace/javaparser-base-template/ as the base project template.    - Use JavaParser AST manipulation to create the transformation.    - Save the transformation rules inside the folder @/workspace/javaparser-base-template/, e.g., in /workspace/javaparser-base-template/src/main/java/github/chains/Main.java.    - Use the JavaParser API documentation located in folder /workspace/javaparser-api-docs/ for reference. 3) Ensure the generated transformation compiles correctly. 4) Apply the transformation to fix the compilation errors. 5) Verify that the project now compiles successfully with mvn compile. "

This is a complex multi-step task. Let me break it down:

1. Run mvn compile in /workspace/biapi/ to get compilation errors
2. Create a JavaParser transformation to fix the errors using the template in /workspace/javaparser-base-template/
3. Use JavaParser API docs in /workspace/javaparser-api-docs/ for reference
4. Ensure the transformation compiles
5. Apply the transformation to fix biapi/
6. Verify the project compiles successfully

Let me start by creating a todo list and then running the initial compilation to see what errors we're dealing with.

116: 		jasperDesign.setBottomMargin(properties.getBottomMargin());

122: 	private int calcColumnsWidth()
123: 	{

141: 	private int calcPageWidth(final PageProperties properties)
142: 	{

150: 		width += properties.getLeftMargin() + properties.getRightMargin();
151: 		
152: 		return width;

156: 	/**

160: 	private int calcMaxHeaderHeight()
161: 	{
162: 		
163: 		final JLabel lbl = new JLabel("a");
164: 		int maxHeight = 0;
165: 		
166: 		for(final TemplateColumn col : this.config.getColumns())
167: 		{
168: 			final ColumnStyle style = col.getHeaderColumn().getStyle();
169: 			final Font font = style.getFont();
170: 			lbl.setFont(font);
171: 			//get the normal height of the label
172: 			int lblHeigh = (int)lbl.getPreferredSize().getHeight();
173: 			//add the column border width
174: 			lblHeigh+= style.getColBorder().getLineWidth()*2;
175: 			//Add padding
176: 			lblHeigh+= style.getColumnPadding().getTopWidth() + style.getColumnPadding().getBottomWidth();
177: 			
178: 			if(lblHeigh > maxHeight)
179: 			{
180: 				maxHeight = lblHeigh;
181: 			}
182: 		}
183: 		
184: 		return maxHeight;
185: 	}

187: 	private int calcMaxContentHeight()
188: 	{
189: 		
190: 		final JLabel lbl = new JLabel("a");
191: 		int maxHeight = 0;
192: 		
193: 		for(final TemplateColumn col : this.config.getColumns())
194: 		{
195: 			final ColumnStyle style = col.getContentColumn().getStyle();
196: 			final Font font = style.getFont();
197: 			lbl.setFont(font);
198: 			int lblHeigh = (int)lbl.getPreferredSize().getHeight();
199: 			//Add border width
200: 			lblHeigh+= style.getColBorder().getLineWidth()*2;

202: 			lblHeigh+= style.getColumnPadding().getTopWidth() + style.getColumnPadding().getBottomWidth();
203:

214: 	private void createTemplateFields(final JasperDesign jasperDesign) throws ExportException
215: 	{
216: 		JRDesignField field;
217: 		
218: 		for(final TemplateColumn col : this.config.getColumns())
219: 		{

227: 				this.fieldSet.add(field);
228: 			}

232: 						+ col.getContentColumn().getFieldName(),e);
233: 			}
234: 		}

236: 	}

239: 	private JRDesignField chooseValueClass(final TemplateColumn col, final JRDesignField field)
240: 	{

242: 		
243: 		if(valueClass.isAssignableFrom(byte[].class) || valueClass.isAssignableFrom(XdevBlob.class) || valueClass.isAssignableFrom(XdevClob.class))
244: 		{
245: 			field.setValueClass(String.class);
246: 		}
247: 		else

252: 		return field;

256: 	private void createHeaderAndContent(final JRDesignBand headerBand, final JRDesignBand detailBand)
257: 	{

261: 				
262: 		final int headerLabelHeight = this.calcMaxHeaderHeight();

278: 				// propertys of the Column
279: 				if(col.hasHeaderColumn())
280: 				{
281: 					final HeaderColumn headerColumn = col.getHeaderColumn();
282: 					// Build label and set x / y
283: 					headerLabel = new JRDesignStaticText();
284: 					headerLabel.setX(x);
285: 					headerLabel.setWidth(col.getWidth());
286: 					headerLabel.setY(TemplateConfig.DEFAULT_COMPONENT_Y_POSITION);
287: 					
288: 					headerLabel.setHeight(headerLabelHeight);
289: 					this.setStlyeForTextField(headerLabel,headerColumn.getStyle());
290: 					this.prepareTextfieldWithBorder(headerLabel,headerColumn.getStyle());
291: 					this.prepareTextfieldPadding(headerLabel,headerColumn.getStyle());
292: 					
293: 					headerLabel.setPositionType(PositionTypeEnum.FLOAT);
294: 
295: 					
296: 					// Get the Property
297: 					headerLabel.setText(headerColumn.getProperty());
298: 					headerBand.addElement(headerLabel);
299: 				}
300: 				else
301: 				{
302: 					// an empty label must be added to complete the layout
303: 					// Build label and set x / y
304: 					emptyHeaderLabel = new JRDesignStaticText();
305: 					emptyHeaderLabel.setX(x);
306: 					emptyHeaderLabel.setWidth(col.getWidth());
307: 					headerBand.addElement(emptyHeaderLabel);
308: 				}
309: 			}
310: 			
311: 			final ContentColumn contentColumn = col.getContentColumn();
312: 			
313: 			textField = new JRDesignTextField();
314: 			textField.setX(x);
315: 			textField.setWidth(col.getWidth());
316: 			textField.setY(TemplateConfig.DEFAULT_COMPONENT_Y_POSITION);
317: 			textField.setHeight(contentLabelHeight);
318: 			
319: 			this.setStlyeForTextField(textField,contentColumn.getStyle());
320: 			textField.setPattern(contentColumn.getProperty());
321: 			
322: 			// box tag properties
323: 			this.prepareTextfieldWithBorder(textField,contentColumn.getStyle());
324: 			this.prepareTextfieldPadding(textField,contentColumn.getStyle());
325: 			
326: 			textField.setExpression(this.buildExpression(contentColumn));
327: 			
328: 			textField.setPositionType(PositionTypeEnum.FLOAT);
329: 			
330: 			if(this.config.isBlankWhenNullValue())
331: 			{
332: 				textField.setBlankWhenNull(true);
333: 			}
334: 			detailBand.addElement(textField);
335: 			
336: 			x += col.getWidth();
337: 		}
338: 		
339: 	}

341: 	private void setStlyeForTextField(final JRDesignTextElement txtField, final ColumnStyle style)
342: 	{
343: 		txtField.setBackcolor(style.getBackground());
344: 		txtField.setForecolor(style.getForeground());
345: 		// Font
346: 		final Font f = style.getFont();
347: 		txtField.setFontName(f.getName());
348: 		txtField.setFontSize(Float.valueOf(f.getSize()));
349: 		txtField.setBold(Boolean.valueOf(f.isBold()));
350: 		txtField.setItalic(Boolean.valueOf(f.isItalic()));
351: 		txtField.setHorizontalTextAlign(style.getHorizontalAlignment().getHorizontalTextAlignEnum());
352: 		
353: 		
354: 		if(!style.getBackground().equals(Color.WHITE))
355: 		{
356: 			txtField.setMode(ModeEnum.OPAQUE);
357: 		}
358: 	}

361: 	private void prepareTextfieldWithBorder(final JRDesignTextElement textField, final ColumnStyle style)
362: 	{
363: 		final ColumnBorder border = style.getColBorder();
364: 		if(border == null)
365: 		{
366: 			return;
367: 		}
368: 		
369: 		textField.getLineBox().getPen().setLineWidth(border.getLineWidth());
370: 		textField.getLineBox().getPen().setLineColor(border.getLineColor());
371: 		textField.getLineBox().getPen().setLineStyle(border.getLineStyle().getLineStyleEnum());
372: 	}

375: 	{
376: 		final ColumnPadding colPadding = style.getColumnPadding();
377: 		final JRLineBox lineBox = textField.getLineBox();
378: 		
379: 		
380: 		lineBox.setTopPadding(colPadding.getTopWidth());
381: 		lineBox.setRightPadding(colPadding.getRightWidth());
382: 		lineBox.setLeftPadding(colPadding.getLeftWidth());
383: 		lineBox.setBottomPadding(colPadding.getBottomWidth());
384: 	}

387: 	private JRDesignExpression buildExpression(final ContentColumn column)
388: 	{

390: 		expression.setText("$F{" + column.getFieldName() + "}");
391: 		return expression;
392: 	}

394: 	
395: 	/**
396: 	 * 
397: 	 * Assemble and compile a {@link JasperReport} based on the information of
398: 	 * the {@link TemplateConfig} object.

403: 	public JasperReport assembleReport() throws ExportException
404: 	{

411: 			final JRDesignBand detailBand = this.initDetailBand();
412: 			
413: 			this.createHeaderAndContent(headerBand,detailBand);
414: 			
415: 			((JRDesignSection)jasperDesign.getDetailSection()).addBand(detailBand);
416: 			if(this.config.hasAnyHeader())
417: 			{
418: 				jasperDesign.setTitle(headerBand);
419: 			}
420: 						
421: 			return JasperCompileManager.compileReport(jasperDesign);
422: 		}
423: 		catch(final Exception e)

425: 			throw new ExportException(e);

11: import java.nio.file.Files;
12: import java.nio.file.Path;
13: import java.nio.file.Paths;
14: import java.util.List;
15: 
16: public class Main {
17: 
18:     public static void main(String[] args) throws Exception {
19:         if (args.length < 1) {
20:             System.err.println("Usage: java Main <source-file-or-directory>");
21:             System.exit(1);
22:         }
23: 
24:         Path path = Paths.get(args[0]);
25:         
26:         if (Files.isDirectory(path)) {
27:             Files.walk(path)
28:                 .filter(p -> p.toString().endsWith(".java"))
29:                 .forEach(Main::transformFile);
30:         } else {
31:             transformFile(path);
32:         }
33:     }
34: 
35:     private static void transformFile(Path filePath) {
36:         try {
37:             String originalContent = Files.readString(filePath);
38:             CompilationUnit cu = StaticJavaParser.parse(filePath);
39:             
40:             IntToFloatConversionVisitor visitor = new IntToFloatConversionVisitor();
41:             visitor.visit(cu, null);
42:             
43:             String transformedContent = cu.toString();
44:             
45:             if (!originalContent.equals(transformedContent)) {
46:                 Files.writeString(filePath, transformedContent);
47:                 System.out.println("Transformed: " + filePath);
48:             }
49:         } catch (Exception e) {
50:             System.err.println("Error processing " + filePath + ": " + e.getMessage());
51:             e.printStackTrace();
52:         }
53:     }
54: 
55:     private static class IntToFloatConversionVisitor extends VoidVisitorAdapter<Void> {
56:         
57:         @Override
58:         public void visit(MethodCallExpr methodCallExpr, Void arg) {
59:             super.visit(methodCallExpr, arg);
60:             
61:             String methodName = methodCallExpr.getNameAsString();
62:             
63:             if ("setLineWidth".equals(methodName)) {
64:                 List<Expression> arguments = methodCallExpr.getArguments();
65:                 
66:                 if (arguments.size() == 1) {
67:                     Expression expression = arguments.get(0);
68:                     
69:                     if (!isFloatType(expression)) {
70:                         ObjectCreationExpr floatWrapper = new ObjectCreationExpr();
71:                         floatWrapper.setType("Float");
72:                         floatWrapper.getArguments().add(expression);
73:                         
74:                         expression.replace(floatWrapper);
75:                     }
76:                 }
77:             }
78:         }
79:         
80:         private boolean isFloatType(Expression expr) {
81:             if (expr instanceof ObjectCreationExpr) {
82:                 ObjectCreationExpr oce = (ObjectCreationExpr) expr;
83:                 return "Float".equals(oce.getType().asString());
84:             }
85:             return false;
86:         }
87:     }
88: }

(End of file - total 88 lines)
